horoscope: Family and home life can be big topics right now, dear Aries, or there's quite a bit of mental activity at home, possibly with learning and work. You're considering your heart when making decisions in general these days, but your ideas are big and ambitious today. You're seeking truths, and you're inclined to talk about issues clearly and openly. Coming up with long-range plans can be a theme. While you’re especially comfortable with others today, you’re also ready to take on a gentle challenge. Supportive emotional and family relationships can figure strongly as the Sun and North Node head into harmony. You might work on healing the family dynamic or gain a better understanding of your deeper needs and desires.

You tend to entertain bigger possibilities today, dear Taurus, and you can discover opportunities to learn new things or expand your mind. You're in particularly good shape for dreaming up new project ideas, and what you're learning or communicating can be exciting. This is a time to see a way out of a problem or to understand a matter more clearly. Good energy is with you for connecting and communicating, especially as the day advances and we get closer to the Sun’s trine to the Moon’s North Node. You can come up with some exciting, high-potential ideas. Mental interests, learning, and projects fare nicely. Your sense of what’s right for you is on point, and you gravitate to gentle challenges.

The Moon spending the day in your sector of joy softens your disposition, dear Gemini, making it a nice time to enjoy and express yourself. You might enjoy mapping out strategies to improve your relationship with money, coming up with fabulous ideas for using your resources more efficiently, or improving business, money, and security or comfort. You can be excited to explore and build on your talents. Today's influences put you in good shape for financial discoveries or ideas that give you a sense that you’re going somewhere. It’s a time to recognize the need to put yourself out there or believe in yourself to succeed and enjoy new opportunities. While it can feel slightly uncomfortable momentarily, you quickly feel good about taking on a gentle challenge.

You can be in the mood to do more talking, writing, and connecting with others today, dear Cancer. You might receive nice feedback or encouraging news today, and you can discover surprising information today and tomorrow. Opportunities to expand your mind, to learn something valuable, or to resolve a conflict may present themselves now. In some ways, you prefer to play things by ear today. With the Sun in your sign heading into harmony with the Moon's North Node, spiritual growth and wellness can be a strong focus. You might be a mentor of sorts, guiding someone to a better mental space. You’re well-positioned for expressive, growth-oriented, sharing, and learning activities. Contributing and connecting come more naturally, and they can be quite rewarding. You might also feel inspired by a story or viewpoint.

Today's energies are strong for seeing a matter more clearly, dear Leo, and it feels great. Hindsight is valuable now, as it helps you move forward. This is also a time to draw upon your wisdom and help others. There can be a boost to your private or emotional life, and you see the benefits of taking extra time to connect with your feelings, inner needs, and desires. With today's supportive aspects involving your solar twelfth house, you may find special meaning in helping others, support, volunteer work, or an intimate connection. Taking the time to relax, refresh, and get in touch with your inner world can be especially rewarding. Drawing upon your inner well comes naturally, and it can be satisfying. Even so, the Moon's transit of your communication sector keeps you mentally busy and engaged.

Today's transits are strong for picking up genuinely useful information, dear Virgo, and for enjoying improved communications. It's also a good time for sharing your knowledge with others. You have more enthusiasm for your dreams and plans, and you might discover an opportunity to learn, share, and enjoy friendships. Mental connections and contacts can be made. It can be especially enjoyable and even therapeutic to stretch your mind and entertain exciting possibilities. With a harmonious Sun-Node connection brewing, your interactions with a partner, friends, or acquaintances can be positive and inspiring. The flow of communication is energetic and smooth, and you or someone in your life can come up with fabulous ideas to contribute to a dream or vision.

You can be hungry to learn new things and to come to conclusions and resolutions today, dear Libra. This is a powerful time for optimism and hope, or supportive, helpful news that excites you about your future. Look for openings and opportunities, particularly involving career, business, and reputation. Today’s transits also contribute to a greater sense of security in your accomplishments or work. Allowing yourself to make some mistakes strengthens your confidence in the long run. There can be a boost to your sense of purpose or mission now. You may be in the position of increased responsibility, and you’re wearing this role well. Still, the Moon spends the day in your sign, and you have your personal plans on your mind.

You're looking for a little more on a mental level today, dear Scorpio. Your thinking is less about the details and more about the bigger picture. You can be feeling quite excited about a project, idea, or venture. There can be good news or conversations that inspire you. This is a time of big ideas and creative vision. You could also discover something valuable to help progress a hobby, pet project, or romance today. With a Sun-Node transit, you’re a little less attached to your worries, leading to just the right atmosphere to enjoy yourself more. Relating to others as equals opens you up to all kinds of opportunities. It’s an excellent time to connect and share ideas and bond with others as you do. You’re feeling more self-confident and optimistic in your social relationships, and you’re seeking more meaning as you express yourself and share your ideas and talents with others.

Today's transits are strong for opening your mind to something you weren't ready to see in the past or to a new opportunity, dear Sagittarius. There can be excitement on a mental level. Investigation and research, or invigorating communications, can be themes. Your desire to grow, build, improve, and move forward, particularly in your emotional or personal life, is prominent today. With a Sun-Node connection building, home or family matters tend to run smoothly, and there may be an opportunity to resolve conflicts or focus on reinforcement and reward. Relationships get a nice boost since you’re fearless in showing your compassion. You may gain just the perspective you need to feel good about your emotional or personal life.

You might benefit from collaboration, dear Capricorn, and learning about your own ideas and perspective through stimulating conversations today. It's a great time to talk through difficulties or put conflicts behind you. You're given the benefit of the doubt now. You may get a sense that reaching out to others is right for you and can help move you forward today. It’s also an excellent time to think up solutions to problems. A Sun-Node harmonious connection tends to position you well to strengthen relationships, make fortunate connections, repair difficulties, and enjoy a sense of mutual support.

You can enjoy and benefit from entertaining new approaches, methods, and ideas that can improve your life today, dear Aquarius. You are feeling particularly hopeful, and you should keep an eye open for opportunities to grow and expand your skills, a business, or a project. You can absorb a lot today, mainly related to your work and health. People value your helpfulness, and through your interactions, you find more meaning in what you do. It can be an exciting time for special ideas and plans, and you could arrive at uniquely creative ideas to make, save, or spend money on, and enjoy your work. Improving your confidence to earn more or take charge of your practical affairs can figure strongly now.

Today's energies are strong for sharing activities or ideas with others, dear Pisces. You can feel a little bolder about expressing yourself, learning, and connecting, and you're likely to have a receptive audience. Hobbies are exciting, and new interests or opportunities to enjoy yourself can present themselves. You’re in great shape for exchanging ideas and enjoying people in your life, and it can be a good time to pay special attention to a special project, pastime, or endeavor. While the day may not be great for sticking to routines, you’re open to challenging yourself and discovering ways to grow and improve.
